scope.goal: Turn the final three composition-only renderer exceptions into machine-validated waivers and reduce the authoritative non-waived renderer census to zero.
nonGoals: No renderer output, route, schema, fixture, loader, or upstream contract change
No new feature or operational capability
No Java or mini-kv write, build, test, start, or stop
No self-granted external N1-close review result

necessityProof.blockerResolved: After v2183 the raw census still reported three unstandardized files, but the plan allowed them only when each composition-only claim was committed and reviewer-checkable.
necessityProof.consumer: The external N1-close review and, only after that review passes, the N5 source-health phase.
necessityProof.whyExistingCensusWasInsufficient: The old census could count the three files but could not distinguish approved composition wrappers from unapproved formatting renderers or detect a stale waiver after source drift.
necessityProof.stopCondition: The waiver count is capped at three, every waiver is AST-validated against exact child calls, and the non-waived unstandardized count is mechanically fixed at zero.

rejectedStates: child renderer call or call-order drift
more than three raw or waived renderers

checkpoint.nextAllowedPhase: Request external N1-close review; N5 starts only after that review passes.

validation.result: passed; 245 total, 242 standardized, 3 AST-validated composition-only waivers, 0 non-waived
1 file passed, 7 tests passed; negative raw-count, waiver-count, appended stricter override, and direct-formatting cases failed as required

lint.result: passed with 0 errors and the unchanged 263-warning baseline

documentationQualityGate.result: 2 files passed, 4 tests passed; walkthrough measured 3095 Chinese characters, 8/8 required sections, compliance score 100, and zero repetition or oversized-section signals

fullSuite.result: 543 files passed, 1654 tests passed, 0 assertion failures
fullSuite.resourceBoundary: At most two Vitest workers; no sibling project or server process was started

diffChecks.result: passed; only repository LF-to-CRLF checkout notices were emitted

screenshot.reason: This version changes a repository census command, policy manifest, tests, and planning evidence only; it creates no HTML or UI surface.
